name: equal_weight_allocation
description: Olympus #30 candidate-only paper research: equal-weight 1/N allocation across BTC/SPY/GLD/TLT with predeclared periodic rebalancing.
promotion_policy: candidate-only; requires positive net-cost results, drawdown reduction versus BTC and SPY single-asset buy-and-hold, Sharpe/Calmar not worse than BTC/SPY and risk-parity baseline, frequency sweep robustness, and walk-forward OOS pass_share >= 0.60 before any further review
